modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to use Flex or Coyote Cash due to negative balance

full_description_text:  
I am facing an issue where I cannot use my Flex or Coyote Cash, even though there is a balance showing. It seems that my account is reflecting a negative balance, which is confusing. I would like to understand why this is happening and how it affects my transactions.
short_description: Unable to use Flex or Coyote Cash due to negative balance
description: I am facing an issue where I cannot use my Flex or Coyote Cash, even though there is a balance showing. It seems that my account is reflecting a negative balance, which is confusing. I would like to understand why this is happening and how it affects my transactions.
